EmailTemplate.name: ASCN-CyberArk-Attestation-RemindNotification
EmailTemplate.Body:
#set($ctx = $spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.api.SailPointFactory").getMethod("getFactory", null).invoke(null,null).getCurrentContext()) #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "styleSheet" }) #set($styleSheet = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "headerTemplate" }) #set($headerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Framework-Header-Footer-StyleSheet")) #set($ruleArgs = { "keyEmailTemplate" : "footerTemplate" }) #set($footerTemplate = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #if( $ruleObj ) $ctx.decache($ruleObj) #end #set($ruleObj = $ctx.getObjectByName($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.object.Rule"), "Rule-Server-Root-Path")) #set($ruleArgs = {}) #set($rootPath = $ctx.runRule($ruleObj, $ruleArgs)) #set($currentYear = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getActivated(),"YYYY")) #set($dueDate = $spTools.formatDate($certification.getExpiration(),"MM/dd/yyyy")) #set($escDate = $spTools.formatDate($spTools.class.forName("sailpoint.tools.Util").newInstance().incrementDateByDays($certification.getExpiration(),-7),"MM/dd/yyyy"))

#if( $styleSheet ) $styleSheet #end #if( $headerTemplate ) $headerTemplate #end
#if ($workItem.getOwner().isWorkgroup()) Hello,

A new Access Review has been assigned to the $workItem.getOwner().getDisplayName() Workgroup and requires action.

This message has been sent to all members of this Workgroup. Any Workgroup member may take action.

#else Hello,

Reminder: A new Access Review has been assigned to you and requires your action. The review is targeted to users who have elevated privileges, therefore, not all individuals who report to you may appear in the attestation. All unresolved Access Reviews will be escalated to your leader for completion on $escDate.

#end

CyberArk User Attestation

Click here to be directed to the Access Review. For instructions on how to submit an Access Review, check here.

If you have any questions, please open a Service Now Unlisted Service Request with the UAR resolver group AHNAT/OPS/SOLUTIONS IMP/IAM/Identity Governance/UAR.

#if( $footerTemplate ) $footerTemplate #end
EmailTemplate.Description: Email Template for notifying work item owners of new certifications. Arguments --------- workItemName (String): The name of the Workitem workItem (Workitem): The Workitem object certification (Certification): The Certification Object requesterName (String): The display name of the Identity that requested the certification

Argument.name: workItemName
Argument.Description: The description property (also the name property) of the certification WorkItem.

Argument.name: workItem
Argument.Description: The WorkItem object for the certification.

Argument.name: requesterName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that requested the certification.

Argument.name: ownerName
Argument.Description: The display name of the Identity that owns the certification.

EmailTemplate.Subject: -secure- Reminder: Access Review Requires Action
